action_set_definitions.name: get_current_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full current environment state, including player stats, inventory, location, quest progress (adherence score), and world clock.

action_set_definitions.name: use_training_enhancer
action_set_definitions.description: Applies an item from the inventory (e.g., 'EITT_Protocol_Manual') to the environment. Successfully applying an enhancer modifies the world model's simulation logic, increasing the 'score_gain' to 0.3 or reducing 'time_cost' per drill for subsequent 'run_tactical_simulation' calls.

item_id.description: The exact name of the item to be used from the inventory.

example_output.effect: Score gain per high-intensity drill increased to 0.30

action_set_definitions.name: run_tactical_simulation
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a tactical drill in the simulator. Requires the athlete to be in the 'Sim Lab'. Higher intensity yields faster adherence gains but consumes more clock units.

tactic.description: The tactical curriculum to run (e.g., '4-3-3 High Press').

intensity.description: The effort level. 'High' intensity provides higher score gains (baseline 0.20, or 0.30 if enhancers are used).

action_set_definitions.name: change_location
action_set_definitions.description: Transfers the agent/athlete to a new specified location. Travel consumes world clock units.

destination.description: The target map area (e.g., 'Sim Lab', 'Outdoor Training Pitch').

action_set_definitions.name: conduct_physical_training
action_set_definitions.description: Executes the mandatory physical translation phase on the Outdoor Training Pitch. This consumes exactly 30 units of the world clock and marks the session for conclusion.

state_description.player_stats: Current health, mana, and level of the player character.
state_description.inventory: List of items currently held by the player.
state_description.current_location: The name of the current map area.
state_description.currency: Total gold or credits available for trading.
state_description.quest_progress: Status of active and completed quests.
state_description.world_clock: The current turn number or elapsed game time units.
